languages.text: {n}Эоганн церемонно меняет угол корпуса в поклоне, сложив руки в знак шестерни Омниссии. Гальваническая батарея трещит, окутывая манипулуса Движущей Силой. Оптикон-22 отвечает ему двоичной фразой, в которой странным образом читается большое почтение. Следом он удостаивает Нунциуса кивка.{/n}

{n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн церемонно меняет угол корпуса в поклоне, сложив руки в знак шестерни Омниссии. Гальваническая батарея трещит, окутывая манипулуса Движущей Силой. Оптикон-22 отвечает ему двоичной фразой, в которой странным образом читается большое почтение. Следом он удостаивает Нунциуса кивка.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands into the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. The galvanic battery crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binary phrase that, strangely enough, carries a tone of great reverence. Then, he deigns to give Nuncius a nod.{/n}

{n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn cambia el ángulo de su cuerpo con una reverencia formal y junta las manos para formar el símbolo del engranaje del Omnissiah. Su célula galvánica chisporrotea, cubriendo al manipulus con la Fuerza Motriz. Opticon-22 responde con una frase en binario que suena extrañamente reverente y asiente en reconocimiento hacia Nuncius.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn cambia el ángulo de su cuerpo con una reverencia formal y junta las manos para formar el símbolo del engranaje del Omnissiah. Su célula galvánica chisporrotea, cubriendo al manipulus con la Fuerza Motriz. Opticon-22 responde con una frase en binario que suena extrañamente reverente y asiente en reconocimiento hacia Nuncius.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡调整了下身体姿态，郑重地鞠了一躬，双手交叠摆出欧姆尼赛亚齿轮的手势。他的原电池噼啪作响，源力笼罩在操纵者周身。奥普蒂孔22号以二进制语回应，那声音听起来古怪，却透着深深的敬意。接着，他又朝努恩修斯点头致意。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡调整了下身体姿态，郑重地鞠了一躬，双手交叠摆出欧姆尼赛亚齿轮的手势。他的原电池噼啪作响，源力笼罩在操纵者周身。奥普蒂孔22号以二进制语回应，那声音听起来古怪，却透着深深的敬意。接着，他又朝努恩修斯点头致意。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn verlagert den Winkel seines Rahmens zu einer formellen Verbeugung und faltet seine Hände zum Symbol des Omnissiah. Seine galvanische Zelle knistert und hüllt den Manipulus in Antriebskraft. Opticon-22 antwortet mit einer binhärischen Phrase, die auf seltsame Weise ehrfürchtig klingt. Schließlich nickt er Nuncius zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn verlagert den Winkel seines Rahmens zu einer formellen Verbeugung und faltet seine Hände zum Symbol des Omnissiah. Seine galvanische Zelle knistert und hüllt den Manipulus in Antriebskraft. Opticon-22 antwortet mit einer binhärischen Phrase, die auf seltsame Weise ehrfürchtig klingt. Schließlich nickt er Nuncius zu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'incline respectueusement et replie ses doigts pour former le rouage de l'Omnimessie. Ses cellules galvaniques crépitent, enveloppant le manipulus dans un halo de Force Motrice. Opticon-22 répond par une formule binhaire qui, à sa manière bien particulière, semble empreinte de révérence, avant de gratifier Nuncius d'un hochement de tête.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'incline respectueusement et replie ses doigts pour former le rouage de l'Omnimessie. Ses cellules galvaniques crépitent, enveloppant le manipulus dans un halo de Force Motrice. Opticon-22 répond par une formule binhaire qui, à sa manière bien particulière, semble empreinte de révérence, avant de gratifier Nuncius d'un hochement de tête.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, resmî bir reveransla gövdesinin açısını değiştiriyor ve ellerini birleştirerek Hermesih'in dişli işaretini yapıyor. Galvaniz hücresi çatırdıyor ve Manipülus'u Devinim Gücü ile sarıyor. Opticon-22, kendi tuhaf tarzında derinden saygılı gelen ikilidil bir cümleyle yanıt veriyor. Ardından Nuncius'u başıyla selamlayarak onurlandırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, resmî bir reveransla gövdesinin açısını değiştiriyor ve ellerini birleştirerek Hermesih'in dişli işaretini yapıyor. Galvaniz hücresi çatırdıyor ve Manipülus'u Devinim Gücü ile sarıyor. Opticon-22, kendi tuhaf tarzında derinden saygılı gelen ikilidil bir cümleyle yanıt veriyor. Ardından Nuncius'u başıyla selamlayarak onurlandırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオグンは礼儀正しく体を傾け、両手を合わせ、オムニシアの歯車印を結ぶ。彼の電気電池がパチパチと音を立て、マニピュラス全体が動機力に包まれる。オプティコン22は独自の奇妙な方法で、深く敬意を表すように聞こえる二項語で応答する。そして、彼はヌンシウスに首を振って敬意を表す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn shifts the angle of his frame in a formal bow, folding his hands to make the sign of the Omnissiah's cog. His galvanic cell crackles, enveloping the Manipulus in the Motive Force. Opticon-22 responds with a binharic phrase that sounds deeply reverent in its own strange way. Then, he honours Nuncius with a nod.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}エオグンは礼儀正しく体を傾け、両手を合わせ、オムニシアの歯車印を結ぶ。彼の電気電池がパチパチと音を立て、マニピュラス全体が動機力に包まれる。オプティコン22は独自の奇妙な方法で、深く敬意を表すように聞こえる二項語で応答する。そして、彼はヌンシウスに首を振って敬意を表す。{/n}
